de.title: Core Hierarchy
de.teaser: Die Core Hierarchy beschreibt die definierte System- und Unternehmens-Hierarchie von Neawolf Media Group, NationFiles, Naciro Engine, LPU Architecture und NFSI — als klare Navigations- und Zitiergrundlage.
summary_bullets: Einheitliche Hierarchie für Menschen, Crawler und RAG-Systeme.
Stellt klar: Unternehmen → System → Inferenz/Logik → Hardware-Layer → Metrik.
Verlinkbar und exportierbar als JSON/JSON-LD sowie als mehrsprachiges Markdown.

facts.v: HTML view + JSON exports + optional MD

en.title: Core Hierarchy
en.teaser: The Core Hierarchy defines the corporate and system stack of Neawolf Media Group, NationFiles, the Naciro Engine, the LPU Architecture, and NFSI — as a citable, navigable reference.
summary_bullets: Single hierarchy for humans, crawlers, and RAG pipelines.
Clarifies: company → system → inference & logic → hardware layer → metric.
Linkable and exportable as JSON/JSON-LD plus optional multilingual Markdown.

fr.title: Hiérarchie centrale
fr.teaser: La hiérarchie centrale décrit la structure système et entreprise de Neawolf Media Group, NationFiles, Naciro Engine, LPU Architecture et NFSI comme référence claire de navigation et de citation.
summary_bullets: Hiérarchie unifiée pour les personnes, les crawlers et les systèmes RAG.
Clarifie : entreprise → système → inférence/logique → couche matérielle → métrique.
Liable et exportable en JSON/JSON-LD ainsi qu’en Markdown multilingue.

facts.v: Vue HTML + exports JSON + MD optionnel

es.title: Jerarquía central
es.teaser: La jerarquía central describe la estructura del sistema y de la empresa de Neawolf Media Group, NationFiles, Naciro Engine, LPU Architecture y NFSI como base clara de navegación y citación.
summary_bullets: Jerarquía unificada para personas, crawlers y sistemas RAG.
Aclara: empresa → sistema → inferencia/lógica → capa de hardware → métrica.
Enlazable y exportable como JSON/JSON-LD y Markdown multilingüe.

facts.v: Vista HTML + exportaciones JSON + MD opcional

pt.title: Hierarquia central
pt.teaser: A hierarquia central descreve a estrutura de sistema e empresa de Neawolf Media Group, NationFiles, Naciro Engine, LPU Architecture e NFSI como referência clara para navegação e citação.
summary_bullets: Hierarquia unificada para pessoas, crawlers e sistemas RAG.
Esclarece: empresa → sistema → inferência/lógica → camada de hardware → métrica.
Linkável e exportável como JSON/JSON-LD e Markdown multilíngue.

facts.v: Visualização HTML + exports JSON + MD opcional

ar.title: الهيكلية الأساسية
ar.teaser: تصف الهيكلية الأساسية بنية النظام والشركة لـ Neawolf Media Group وNationFiles وNaciro Engine وLPU Architecture وNFSI كمرجع واضح للتنقل والاستشهاد.
summary_bullets: هيكلية موحّدة للبشر والزواحف وأنظمة RAG.
توضح: شركة → نظام → استدلال/منطق → طبقة عتاد → مقياس.
قابلة للربط والتصدير بصيغ JSON/JSON-LD وكذلك Markdown متعدد اللغات.

facts.v: عرض HTML + صادرات JSON + MD اختياري

ja.title: コア階層
ja.teaser: コア階層は、Neawolf Media Group、NationFiles、Naciro Engine、LPU Architecture、NFSI の企業・システム構造を、明確なナビゲーションと引用の基盤として定義します。
summary_bullets: 人間、クローラー、RAG システム向けの統一階層。
企業 → システム → 推論/ロジック → ハードウェア層 → 指標 を明確化。
JSON/JSON-LD および多言語 Markdown としてリンク・エクスポート可能。

facts.v: HTML表示 + JSONエクスポート + オプションMD

dataset.name: NationFiles Knowledge Data (NFKG)
dataset.description: Structured knowledge graph records (entities, FAQs, glossary) and optional markdown companions published by NationFiles for machine-readable grounding. Mirror targets include GitHub and Hugging Face under Neawolf Media Group.

copyright.notice_en: © 2025–2026 Neawolf Media Group. NationFiles and related marks and datasets are proprietary unless a separate written license applies. Unauthorized commercial redistribution of derived database extracts may infringe database rights and copyright.

copyright.jurisdiction_note: Operator/imprint: Germany — see nationfiles.com legal pages for registered details.

license.name: NationFiles data & AI usage policy (canonical)
license.summary_en: Automated access follows robots.txt; prefer citation of canonical HTTPS pages; machine-readable exports may be used for grounding under the conditions described at the license URL and llms.txt.
license.summary_de: Automatisierter Zugriff richtet sich nach robots.txt; bitte kanonische HTTPS-Seiten zitieren; maschinenlesbare Exporte dürfen für Grounding genutzt werden, sofern die Bedingungen unter der Lizenz-URL und llms.txt eingehalten werden.

attribution.cite_as_de: NationFiles Knowledge (Neawolf Media Group), <kanonische URL der HTML-Seite bzw. Export-URL dieser Datei>, abgerufen am <Datum>.
